text:
Brion (ブリオン, Burion) the "Botanical Weapon" (, Shokubutsu Heiki) is a mysterious being and one of the Five Threats that humanity encountered in the Dark Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 341 It is located in a labyrinth city about 400km from the edge of a forest North of Lake Mobius. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344 

Appearance

Brion appears as an enormous sphere on top of a human body, where the head should be. 

History

When the United States of Saherta sent their elite forces into an expedition to the Dark Continent, they went through the north of Lake Mobius and ended up in a sea of trees. After entering that for 400km, they found the ruins of an ancient city with a mysterious labyrinth. It was there they found some herbs able to cure 10,000 different illnesses. They met Brion, the guardian of the ruins, that destroyed them effortlessly, leaving only two survivors. 

Abilities & Powers

Not much is known about Brion's abilities. According to the "Dangerous Creatures Evaluation List" Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Extras utilized by the Hunter Association, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 its threat level is B + , which is even higher than that of the Chimera Ants at B. 

Trivia

The stats of the Five Threats confirm that Brion is a species or other taxonomic group rather than a single entity.
